reinvestment_behavior.draft: FY2024 reinvestment appears disciplined: high returns are supported while the Senior should verify whether current R&D and platform investment are enough to sustain the ecosystem.
reinvestment_behavior.source_label: AAPL FY2024 EDGAR-derived spine and expense discussion
reinvestment_behavior.excerpt_or_summary: The fixture links operating profitability and reinvestment context to the filed spine and FY2024 Form 10-K discussion.
reinvestment_behavior.filing_reference: AAPL FY2024 Form 10-K, operating expenses and EDGAR-derived spine inputs

shareholder_return_behavior.draft: FY2024 capital returns are a central part of the capital-allocation record; the Senior should judge whether buybacks offset dilution and are made at sensible value.
shareholder_return_behavior.source_label: AAPL FY2024 Form 10-K shareholder return discussion
shareholder_return_behavior.excerpt_or_summary: The fixture identifies repurchases, dividends, and share-count context as the shareholder-return evidence set.
shareholder_return_behavior.filing_reference: AAPL FY2024 Form 10-K, equity and shareholder return disclosures

balance_sheet_discipline.draft: FY2024 balance-sheet discipline looks compatible with a quality compounder, but the Senior should still check debt, cash, and acquisition posture against future capital needs.
balance_sheet_discipline.source_label: AAPL FY2024 EDGAR-derived balance sheet facts
balance_sheet_discipline.excerpt_or_summary: The fixture uses EDGAR-derived cash, debt, and liability concepts to frame balance-sheet discipline.
